positive: A stylized and highly detailed illustration of a majestic, celestial fox spirit (kitsune), seated in a meditative pose on a geometrically patterned cloud bank. The fox should have radiant, glowing fur and ethereal blue-gold markings, radiating magical energy. The background should feature abstract cosmic elements: swirling nebula patterns in deep indigo, violet, and turquoise, crossed by subtle, elegant golden geometric lines (mandala style). Composition must be centered and balanced, designed for a strong, clean silhouette against a vibrant, high-contrast background. Art Style: Neo-traditional Japanese woodcut meets high-fantasy stained glass illustration. Use strong, directional lighting to emphasize the fur's texture and the glow emanating from the fox's core. Color Palette: Electric blues, deep violets, gold, and sapphire, with crisp white highlights. Print Details: Vector art clean lines, optimized for apparel printing, single cohesive illustration.
negative: blur, lowres, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, abstract, photorealistic, gradients, disfigured
